templates.name: Translate Document (EN→DA)
templates.description: Read a Word document, translate from English to Danish, save as new document.

config.description: Translate document from English to Danish

config.task_description: Translate the following document text from English to Danish. Preserve paragraph structure and formatting. Output ONLY the translated text.
config.expected_output: Full document translated to fluent Danish

templates.name: Translate Document (EN→DE)
templates.description: Read a Word document, translate from English to German, save as new document.

config.description: Translate document from English to German

config.task_description: Translate the following document text from English to German. Preserve paragraph structure and formatting. Output ONLY the translated text.
config.expected_output: Full document translated to fluent German

templates.name: Translate Document (EN→FR)
templates.description: Read a Word document, translate from English to French, save as new document.

config.description: Translate document from English to French

config.task_description: Translate the following document text from English to French. Preserve paragraph structure and formatting. Output ONLY the translated text.
config.expected_output: Full document translated to fluent French

templates.name: Translate Document (EN→ES)
templates.description: Read a Word document, translate from English to Spanish, save as new document.

config.description: Translate document from English to Spanish

config.task_description: Translate the following document text from English to Spanish. Preserve paragraph structure and formatting. Output ONLY the translated text.
config.expected_output: Full document translated to fluent Spanish

templates.name: Summarize Document
templates.description: Read a document, generate an executive summary with key points, save as Word.

config.description: Summarize a document into key points

config.task_description:
Read the document content and create a concise executive summary. Include:
1. Main thesis/purpose
2. Key findings/arguments (3-5 bullet points)
3. Conclusions
4. Recommended actions (if applicable)

Keep the summary under 500 words.

templates.name: Extract Key Points
templates.description: Read a document, extract and structure the key takeaways.

config.description: Extract key takeaways from a document

config.task_description: Extract the most important key points from this document as a structured bullet-point list. Group by topic if applicable. Include page/section references where possible.

templates.name: Document Q&A Generator
templates.description: Read a document, generate a comprehensive FAQ section.

config.description: Generate FAQ from document content

config.task_description:
Based on the document content, generate 15-20 frequently asked questions with detailed answers. Format as:

**Q: [Question]**
A: [Answer]

Cover the main topics comprehensively.

templates.name: Proofread & Edit
templates.description: Read a document, fix grammar/style/spelling, save corrected version.

config.description: Proofread and edit document for grammar and style

config.task_description:
Proofread and edit this document for:
1. Grammar and spelling errors
2. Punctuation
3. Sentence clarity and flow
4. Consistency in tone and style
5. Word choice improvements

Output the corrected full text. Do NOT explain changes, just output the improved version.

templates.name: Merge Multiple Documents
templates.description: Read 3 documents in parallel, merge into a single cohesive output.

config.description: Merge multiple documents into one

config.task_description: Combine the text from the three documents provided into a single cohesive document. Maintain the original structure and content of each document. Add clear section dividers between each source document. Output the full merged text.

templates.name: Document Comparison
templates.description: Read two documents, compare content, generate a diff report.

config.description: Compare two documents and highlight differences

config.task_description:
Compare the two documents and create a detailed comparison report:
1. Sections that are identical
2. Sections that differ (show both versions)
3. Content present in A but not B
4. Content present in B but not A
5. Summary of key differences

templates.name: Format Converter (Word→Markdown)
templates.description: Read a Word document, convert to clean Markdown format.

config.description: Convert Word document to Markdown format

config.task_description: Convert the following Word document content to well-formatted Markdown. Preserve all headings (use # syntax), bullet points, bold/italic emphasis, and tables. Output clean, valid Markdown.

templates.name: Multi-Language Translation
templates.description: Translate a document into multiple languages simultaneously.

config.description: Translate document into multiple languages simultaneously

config.task_description:
Translate the document into BOTH German and French. Format output as:

--- GERMAN VERSION ---
[German translation]

--- FRENCH VERSION ---
[French translation]

templates.name: Excel Data Summary
templates.description: Read a spreadsheet, generate statistical summary and insights.

config.description: Analyze Excel data and generate summary

config.task_description:
Analyze this spreadsheet data and generate a statistical summary:
1. Total rows and columns
2. Key metrics (sum, average, min, max) for numeric columns
3. Distribution overview
4. Notable patterns or outliers
5. Top/Bottom 5 entries by key metric

templates.name: CSV to Report
templates.description: Read CSV data, analyze trends, create a formatted Word report.

config.description: Convert CSV data to a formatted report

config.task_description:
From the data provided, create a professional report including:
1. Executive summary
2. Data overview with key statistics
3. Trend analysis
4. Notable findings
5. Recommendations

Format as a professional document.

templates.name: Sales Dashboard Data
templates.description: Read sales spreadsheet, generate KPI dashboard summary.

config.description: Generate sales KPI summary from data

config.task_description:
From the sales data, calculate and present:
1. Total Revenue
2. Revenue by product/category
3. Month-over-month growth
4. Top 10 customers by value
5. Average deal size
6. Win rate (if applicable)
7. Pipeline summary

Format as a clean KPI dashboard report.

templates.name: Merge Excel Files
templates.description: Read 3 Excel files in parallel, merge into one consolidated spreadsheet.

config.description: Merge multiple Excel files into one consolidated spreadsheet

config.task_description:
You have received data from three separate Excel files. Merge all the data into a single unified dataset:
1. Identify common columns across all three files
2. Combine all rows, marking which source file each row came from
3. Remove duplicates if any
4. Sort by the primary key column
5. Output as tab-separated data (TSV format) suitable for Excel

templates.name: Financial Consolidation
templates.description: Read P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow; merge into consolidated financial report.

config.description: Consolidate financial statements from multiple sources

config.task_description:
Consolidate the three financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow) into a unified financial report:
1. Key financial ratios
2. Revenue and expense trends
3. Liquidity analysis
4. Profitability metrics
5. Cash position summary
6. Red flags or notable changes

Present as a professional CFO briefing document.

templates.name: Inventory Check
templates.description: Read inventory spreadsheet, flag low-stock items, generate reorder list.

config.description: Check inventory levels and flag low-stock items

config.task_description:
Analyze the inventory data and:
1. Identify items below minimum stock levels (assume min = 10 if not specified)
2. Flag items with zero stock
3. Calculate days of supply remaining
4. Generate a reorder recommendation list
5. Highlight overstocked items

templates.name: Cross-Department Data Merge
templates.description: Read HR, Sales, Finance Excel files; merge into cross-functional dashboard.

config.description: Merge data from HR, Sales, and Finance departments

config.task_description:
Analyze data from three departments (HR, Sales, Finance) and create a cross-functional dashboard:
1. Headcount vs Revenue correlation
2. Cost per employee
3. Revenue per department
4. Budget utilization
5. Productivity metrics

Output as tab-separated data for the summary dashboard.

templates.name: Multi-Vendor Price Comparison
templates.description: Read 3 vendor price lists, compare products, highlight best prices.

config.description: Compare prices from multiple vendor price lists

config.task_description:
Compare the price lists from three vendors:
1. Match products across all vendors
2. For each product, show all three vendor prices
3. Highlight the cheapest vendor for each item
4. Calculate potential savings by choosing optimal vendor
5. Overall vendor ranking by price competitiveness

Output as tab-separated comparison table.

templates.name: Survey Results Analysis
templates.description: Read survey data, analyze responses, generate insights report.

config.description: Analyze survey results and generate insights

config.task_description:
Analyze the survey data:
1. Response rate and completion statistics
2. Score averages per question
3. Sentiment analysis of free-text responses
4. Key themes and patterns
5. Top complaints and praise
6. Recommendations based on findings

templates.name: Expense Report Builder
templates.description: Read expenses Excel, categorize, create formatted expense report.

config.description: Build expense report from raw expense data

config.task_description:
From the expense data, create a structured expense report:
1. Total expenses by category
2. Monthly breakdown
3. Top 10 largest expenses
4. Policy compliance flags (meals > $50, travel > $500, etc.)
5. Year-to-date comparison
6. Budget remaining

templates.name: Multi-Month Sales Trend
templates.description: Read 4 months of sales Excel files, analyze trends and forecast.

config.description: Analyze sales trends across multiple monthly reports

config.task_description:
Analyze the monthly sales data across Jan-Apr:
1. Month-over-month revenue trend
2. Growth/decline rates
3. Best performing products each month
4. Seasonal patterns
5. Forecast for next month
6. Key recommendations

templates.name: Data Quality Audit
templates.description: Read spreadsheet, audit for quality issues, generate cleanup recommendations.

config.description: Audit data quality in a spreadsheet

config.task_description:
Perform a data quality audit:
1. Missing values per column
2. Duplicate rows
3. Data type inconsistencies
4. Outlier detection
5. Format issues (dates, phone numbers, etc.)
6. Completeness score per column
7. Recommendations for data cleaning

templates.name: Blog Post Writer
templates.description: Generate a blog post from a topic and save as Word document.

config.description: Generate a blog post from a topic and save as Word document.

config.task_description:
Write a compelling, well-structured blog post about the topic provided. Include:
1. Engaging headline
2. Hook introduction
3. 3-5 main sections with subheadings
4. Supporting examples and data points
5. Call to action conclusion

Write in a professional yet approachable tone. Aim for 800-1200 words.

templates.name: Product Description Writer
templates.description: Generate compelling product descriptions from specifications.

config.description: Generate compelling product descriptions from specifications.

config.task_description:
Write professional product descriptions for the product specs provided. For each product:
1. Compelling headline
2. 2-3 sentence summary
3. Key features as bullet points
4. Benefits to customer
5. Technical specifications

Tone: professional, persuasive, customer-focused.

templates.name: Press Release Writer
templates.description: Draft a professional press release from key facts.

config.description: Draft a professional press release from key facts.

config.task_description:
Write a professional press release following standard PR format:
1. FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE header
2. Compelling headline and subheadline
3. Dateline (city, date)
4. Lead paragraph (who, what, when, where, why)
5. Body with quotes from stakeholders
6. Boilerplate about the company
7. Media contact information

Tone: formal, newsworthy, factual.

templates.name: Landing Page Copy
templates.description: Generate landing page copy with headlines, features, and CTA.

config.description: Generate landing page copy with headlines, features, and CTA.

config.task_description:
Write conversion-focused landing page copy:
1. Hero headline and subheadline
2. Problem statement
3. Solution overview
4. 3-5 key features with benefit-driven descriptions
5. Social proof section (testimonial templates)
6. FAQ section (5 questions)
7. Call to action (primary and secondary)

Optimize for conversions.

templates.name: FAQ Generator
templates.description: Generate a comprehensive FAQ section from product/service information.

config.description: Generate a comprehensive FAQ section from product/service information.

config.task_description:
Create a comprehensive FAQ section with 15-20 questions covering:
1. General questions about the product/service
2. Pricing and plans
3. Technical requirements
4. Getting started
5. Troubleshooting common issues
6. Account and billing
7. Support and contact

Format each as Q: and A: pairs.

templates.name: Script Writer (Video/Podcast)
templates.description: Create a video or podcast script from an outline.

config.description: Create a video or podcast script from an outline.

config.task_description:
Write a professional video/podcast script:
1. Cold open hook (15 seconds)
2. Intro and greeting
3. Main content segments (3-5)
4. Transitions between segments
5. Call to action
6. Outro

Include [VISUAL] or [MUSIC] cues. Aim for 10-15 minutes.

templates.name: White Paper Draft
templates.description: Research and write a structured white paper on a topic.

config.description: Research and write a structured white paper on a topic.

config.task_description:
Write a professional white paper:
1. Title page with abstract
2. Introduction with problem statement
3. Background and context
4. Methodology/approach
5. Findings and analysis
6. Implications
7. Conclusion and next steps
8. References

Aim for 2000-3000 words. Academic but accessible tone.

templates.name: Case Study Builder
templates.description: Generate a structured business case study from project data.

config.description: Generate a structured business case study from project data.

config.task_description:
Create a professional case study:
1. Client overview
2. Challenge/problem statement
3. Solution approach
4. Implementation details
5. Results with metrics
6. Key takeaways
7. Client testimonial template

Use the SITUATION-TASK-ACTION-RESULT format.

templates.name: Newsletter Compiler
templates.description: Browse news sites, compile a polished newsletter digest.

config.description: Compile AI news from multiple sources into newsletter

config.task_description:
From the scraped web content, compile a professional newsletter digest:
1. Greeting
2. Top stories section (5-7 stories, each with headline and 2-sentence summary)
3. Quick takes (shorter news bites)
4. Closing note

Use markdown formatting. Keep it scannable.

templates.name: SEO Article Writer
templates.description: Research keywords, write SEO-optimized long-form article.

config.description: Enter target keyword and topic for SEO article

config.task_description:
Write an SEO-optimized article:
1. Include target keyword in title, first paragraph, and naturally throughout
2. Use H2/H3 subheadings with keyword variations
3. Write 1500+ words
4. Include internal/external link suggestions
5. Add meta description (155 chars)
6. Include FAQ schema section

Make it informative and engaging, not keyword-stuffed.

templates.name: Social Media Calendar
templates.description: Generate a week of social media posts, save as Excel calendar.

config.description: Enter brand/product info for social media calendar

config.task_description:
Create a 7-day social media content calendar with posts for:
- LinkedIn (1/day)
- Twitter/X (2/day)
- Instagram (1/day)

For each post include:
- Platform
- Date/time to post
- Post text/caption
- Image suggestion
- Hashtags
- CTA

Output as tab-separated data for Excel.

templates.name: Email Template Generator
templates.description: Create 10 professional email templates for common business scenarios.

config.description: Generate email templates for different business scenarios

config.task_description:
Create 10 professional email templates for common business scenarios:
1. Initial outreach
2. Follow-up after no response
3. Meeting request
4. Thank you after meeting
5. Proposal submission
6. Feedback request
7. Project update
8. Deadline reminder
9. Apology/correction
10. Referral request

Each template should have: Subject line, body with [PLACEHOLDER] fields, and sign-off.

templates.name: Weekly Status Report Email
templates.description: Compile weekly status and email to team.

config.description: Compile weekly status and email to team.

config.task_description:
Compile a professional weekly status report email including:
1. Accomplishments this week
2. Work in progress
3. Blockers/issues
4. Plans for next week
5. Key metrics update

Keep it concise and scannable.

templates.name: Customer Follow-Up Email
templates.description: Generate personalized follow-up emails after meetings.

config.description: Generate personalized follow-up emails after meetings.

config.task_description:
Write a professional follow-up email after a customer meeting:
1. Thank them for their time
2. Summarize key discussion points
3. List agreed next steps
4. Attach relevant resources
5. Set expectations for next contact

Personalize with customer name placeholder.

templates.name: Meeting Summary Email
templates.description: Read meeting notes, summarize, email participants.

config.description: Read meeting notes, summarize, email participants.

config.task_description:
Create a clear meeting summary email:
1. Meeting title, date, attendees
2. Agenda items discussed
3. Key decisions made
4. Action items with owners and deadlines
5. Next meeting date/time

Keep it structured and actionable.

templates.name: Welcome Onboarding Email
templates.description: Generate new employee welcome email.

config.description: Generate new employee welcome email.

config.task_description:
Write a warm, professional onboarding welcome email:
1. Enthusiastic welcome
2. First day logistics
3. Key contacts and their roles
4. Required setup (tools, accounts)
5. First week schedule overview
6. Company culture highlights
7. Who to ask for help

templates.name: Invoice Reminder
templates.description: Read overdue invoices, draft reminder emails.

config.description: Read overdue invoices, draft reminder emails.

config.task_description:
Draft a professional payment reminder email:
1. Reference invoice number and amount
2. Original due date
3. Days overdue
4. Payment instructions
5. Offer assistance if there's an issue

Tone: firm but friendly.

templates.name: Feedback Request Email
templates.description: Generate customer feedback request emails.

config.description: Generate customer feedback request emails.

config.task_description:
Write a feedback request email:
1. Thank for recent interaction
2. Explain importance of feedback
3. Include 3 specific questions
4. Link to survey (placeholder)
5. Offer incentive if applicable

Keep it short and respectful of their time.

templates.name: Event Invitation Email
templates.description: Create professional event invitation emails.

config.description: Create professional event invitation emails.

config.task_description:
Write an event invitation email:
1. Event name and description
2. Date, time, and location
3. Agenda/program highlights
4. Speaker/host information
5. RSVP instructions
6. What to bring/prepare
7. Contact for questions

templates.name: Partnership Outreach Email
templates.description: Generate partnership proposal emails.

config.description: Generate partnership proposal emails.

config.task_description:
Write a partnership proposal email:
1. Introduction of your company
2. Why you're reaching out to them specifically
3. Proposed partnership model
4. Mutual benefits
5. Success metrics
6. Suggested next steps
7. Call to action for a meeting

templates.name: Internal Announcement
templates.description: Draft company-wide announcement email.

config.description: Draft company-wide announcement email.

config.task_description:
Write an internal company announcement email:
1. Clear, attention-grabbing subject
2. The news/announcement
3. Why it matters to employees
4. How it affects their work
5. Timeline and next steps
6. Who to contact for questions

templates.name: Apology/Service Recovery Email
templates.description: Draft professional apology and recovery emails.

config.description: Draft professional apology and recovery emails.

config.task_description:
Write a professional service recovery email:
1. Acknowledge the issue
2. Sincere apology
3. Explain what happened (without excuses)
4. What you're doing to fix it
5. Compensation/goodwill gesture
6. Prevention measures
7. Personal contact for follow-up

config.subject: We're Sorry - Here's How We're Making It Right

templates.name: Competitor Analysis
templates.description: Browse competitor websites, analyze positioning, generate report.

config.task_description:
Analyze the competitor data and create a comprehensive competitive analysis:

templates.name: Customer Persona Builder

templates.name: Competitive SWOT Analysis
templates.description: Build a SWOT matrix for competitive positioning.

config.description: Build a SWOT matrix for competitive positioning.

config.task_description:

5. Score severity of each change (Low/Medium/High/Critical)

Output a structured redline report.

2. Priority (Urgent/High/Normal/Low)
3. Department routing (Finance, Legal, HR, Operations, Management)
4. Key entities (names, dates, amounts)
5. Action required

Output as a structured routing table in TSV format.

4. Risk scoring per gap
5. Remediation recommendations
6. Priority order for fixes

1. Revenue trend and growth rate
2. Cost structure evolution
3. Margin analysis
4. YoY comparisons
5. Next quarter forecast (linear + weighted)
6. Risk scenarios (bull/base/bear)
7. Key drivers of performance

Output both narrative analysis and forecast data in TSV format.
From the trend analysis and forecast, create a board-ready presentation outline with key talking points, executive summary, and strategic recommendations.

3. Handle missing values
4. Remove duplicates
5. Normalize date formats
6. Create unified customer ID mapping
7. Output cleaned data as TSV

From the cleaned multi-source data, generate:

templates.name: Anomaly Detection Pipeline
templates.description: Read transaction data, detect anomalies, cross-reference with historical data, escalate findings.

config.description: Detect anomalies in transaction data

config.task_description:
Compare current transactions against historical baseline:
1. Statistical outliers (>3 standard deviations)
2. Unusual transaction patterns
3. Velocity anomalies (frequency spikes)
4. Amount anomalies (unusual values)
5. Geographic anomalies
6. Time-of-day anomalies
7. Score each anomaly 1-10 by severity

Output flagged transactions with explanations.

From the reviewed anomalies, create an alert report:
1. Executive summary
2. Critical alerts
3. Investigation recommendations
4. Risk assessment
5. Immediate actions needed

- 3 LinkedIn posts

- Hashtag sets per platform
All promoting the blog content.

Create an infographic content brief:
1. Title
2. Key statistics (6-8 data points)
3. Visual flow (sections and layout)
4. Color scheme suggestions
5. Call to action

- Agenda
- 4 sections (6 slides each)
- Q&A slide
- CTA/closing

For each slide: title, key points, visual suggestions.

Write:

3. 5 social media clips (key quotes/stats for sharing)

2. Fishbone (Ishikawa) diagram categories:
   - People, Process, Equipment, Materials, Environment, Management
3. Contributing factors per category
4. Root cause identification
5. Evidence and data supporting each finding

From the RCA findings, create a corrective action plan:
1. Immediate containment actions
2. Short-term corrective actions (1-4 weeks)
3. Long-term preventive actions (1-6 months)
4. Owner assignments
5. Verification methods
6. Effectiveness metrics
7. Recurrence prevention

4. Pay equity analysis
5. Inclusion survey results
6. Belonging score trends
7. ERG participation
8. Year-over-year progress
9. Goals vs actuals
10. Recommendations and action plan

templates.name: Contract Lifecycle Manager
templates.description: Read contract, check expiry, analyze obligations, generate renewal recommendation.

config.description: Review contract for renewal decision

config.task_description:
Analyze the contract:
1. Key terms and obligations
2. Expiry date and auto-renewal clauses
3. Performance against SLAs
4. Financial obligations and value
5. Risk assessment
6. Negotiation leverage points
7. Renewal recommendation (Renew/Renegotiate/Terminate)
8. Negotiation strategy if renegotiating

templates.name: Enterprise Risk Register Builder
templates.description: Read data from multiple departments, build comprehensive risk register with mitigation plans.

config.description: Build enterprise risk register

config.task_description:
Create an enterprise risk register:
1. Consolidate all risk inputs
2. Categorize (Strategic/Operational/Financial/Compliance)
3. Score each risk (Probability × Impact)
4. Heat map data (TSV format)
5. Top 10 critical risks
6. Mitigation plan per critical risk
7. Risk owners
8. Monitoring frequency
9. KRIs (Key Risk Indicators)
10. Board summary

templates.name: Audit Preparation Package
templates.description: Read policies, procedures, and evidence; browse regulatory requirements; generate audit-ready package.

config.description: Prepare for upcoming audit

config.task_description:
Create a comprehensive audit preparation package:
1. Audit scope and objectives
2. Policy-to-standard mapping matrix
3. Evidence completeness checklist
4. Gap identification
5. Mock audit findings
6. Corrective action recommendations
7. Interview preparation guide
8. Document index
9. Timeline and logistics plan

templates.name: Full Curriculum Design
templates.description: Research best practices, read learning objectives, generate complete curriculum with assessments.

config.description: Design a full training curriculum

config.task_description:
Design a comprehensive curriculum:
1. Program overview and goals
2. Prerequisite assessment
3. Module breakdown (10-12 modules)
4. Learning activities per module
5. Hands-on exercises
6. Discussion questions
7. Assessment strategy
8. Grading rubric
9. Instructor guide notes

Create a full assessment package:
1. Pre-assessment (baseline test)
2. Module quizzes (one per module)
3. Mid-term project assignment
4. Final exam (50 questions)
5. Answer keys with explanations
6. Grading criteria

templates.name: E-Learning Course Builder
templates.description: Generate complete e-learning course: script, quiz bank, slide content, and instructor notes.

config.description: Build a complete e-learning course

config.task_description: Write a 10-module e-learning course script. Each module should have: narration text, key concepts, examples, and transition prompts. Include timing estimates.

Create a 100-question quiz bank covering all 10 modules:
- 50 multiple choice
- 25 true/false
- 15 matching
- 10 short answer
Include answer key and difficulty rating per question.

Create slide content for 10 modules (6-8 slides per module):
- Title slides
- Key concept slides
- Diagram descriptions
- Summary slides
- Interactive element suggestions

templates.name: Training Effectiveness Evaluation
templates.description: Read pre/post test scores and feedback, analyze training effectiveness, generate improvement plan.

config.description: Evaluate training program effectiveness

config.task_description:
Perform a Kirkpatrick 4-level training evaluation:
Level 1 (Reaction): Participant satisfaction analysis
Level 2 (Learning): Pre vs post-test improvement
Level 3 (Behavior): Skill application indicators
Level 4 (Results): Business impact metrics

Include:
- Statistical analysis of score improvements
- Knowledge retention rates
- Satisfaction scores by module
- Recommendations for curriculum improvements
- ROI of training program
